title: oreostemma
intro: Oreostemma alpigenum, commonly known as alpine betony or alpine lousewort, is a perennial plant species native to the mountainous regions of North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of oreostemma include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory issues, and support immune function. Herbal preparations of oreostemma can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, which can be consumed to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
